Dialog.name: MSG_Yakekuso_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5070 0 0}That Shadow seems especially aggressive, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Yakekuso_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}I'm not sure why, but it appears to be agitated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's fast, but not well coordinated. Stay calm and dodge, and you should be fine.[n]{f 1 1}
